Packet Buffer Reference
Table Summary Microbursts Trident+ Trident II Deep Buffer

Force10 S60 (Dell)

The Force10 S60 is a large-buffer 1RU switch using external DRAM for packet buffering. See the deep buffer concept page for context.

Field Value
Ports 48 GigE + 4 SFP+
RX Queues 4Q
Total Buffer 1,250 MB
TX Buffer "enough"

The 1.25 GB buffer is large enough to absorb extended bursts at a 10G→1G speed step without dropping packets.

References

  • Force10 S60 Spec Sheet
  • Force10 S60 Buffer Tuning Guide

← Back to the main buffer table

Source: Jim Warner, UCSC (archived 2014). Information is by rumor, innuendo, and extrapolation. Manufacturers rarely publish packet buffer data in their data sheets.
